missing_main_functions: Password Reset / Forgot Password (not explicitly required but implied by security context)
Account Deletion / Self-Service Account Management (not required but often related)
missing_sub_functions: SUB010: Token Expiry Check on Resend (verify that resend only works if previous token is expired or invalid, not if still valid)
SUB011: Email Format Validation (ensure email format is validated before uniqueness check)
SUB012: Concurrent Registration Handling (test race conditions when two users register with same unverified email simultaneously)
unclear_categories: CAT001: 'Unique Email Check for Verified Accounts' - test intent mentions 'generic error message' but requirement does not specify exact message; could be ambiguous
CAT019: 'Rate Limiting on Resend Requests' - no specific rate limit defined in requirements; test category may be too vague without concrete limits
CAT020: 'Email Delivery Failure Handling' - requirement does not specify user-facing message for delivery failure; test intent assumes generic error but not confirmed
recommendations: Add a main function for 'Password Reset' if it is part of the system scope, as it is a common companion to registration and verification.
Include a sub-function for email format validation (e.g., RFC 5322 compliance) to ensure robustness.
Clarify the exact error message for duplicate verified email registration (CAT001) to avoid ambiguity.
Define specific rate limits for resend requests (CAT019) or mark as 'to be defined' in test category.
Add a sub-function to handle token expiry check on resend to prevent unnecessary token regeneration.
Consider adding a test category for concurrent registration attempts to ensure database integrity.
Ensure that the 'Resend Verification Email' button behavior is tested when the user is already verified (should not allow resend).
